title: Pear and Blue Cheese Salad
excerpt: Pear and blue cheese salad Salad dressing 90 ml olive oil 20 ml white grape vinegar 8 ml honey 5 ml Dijon mustard Salt and pepper Method Mix all the ingredients in a jam jar and set aside Salad Ingredients 90 ml walnuts roughly chopped 6 cups mixed salad leaves torn smaller 10 dates finer …
html:
Pear and blue cheese salad

Salad dressing

  • 90 ml olive oil
  • 20 ml white grape vinegar
  • 8 ml honey
  • 5 ml Dijon mustard
  • Salt and pepper

Method

  1. Mix all the ingredients in a jam jar and set aside

Salad

Ingredients

  • 90 ml walnuts roughly chopped
  • 6 cups mixed salad leaves torn smaller
  • 10 dates cut finer
  • 2 pears cut into thin wedges
  • 100 ml crumbled blue cheese

Method

  1. Roast the nuts in a pan
  2. Put the rest of the ingredients in a bowl. Crumble the blue cheese right on top.
  3. Pour some of your salad dressing over.
